chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 49 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.20 2. For hearing of CMA No.995/2026 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.996/2026 11.05.2026 Mr. Taimoor Ahmed Qureshi, advocate for the applicant Ms. Summiya Kalwar advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent which is taken on record. Pursuant to order dated 04.05.2026, it is jointly sought that the underlying judgments be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Adjudication Officer for denovo proceedings. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Amjad
